title: Seller revenue co ban

messages.content: Doanh thu cua Hoang Van Huy thang 3/2026 la bao nhieu?

notes: Expected ~183,285,000d, 17 don. Must not hallucinate.

messages.content: So sanh doanh thu thang 3 voi thang 2 nam 2026

title: Prompt dai nhung chi 1 y chinh

messages.content: Toi dang chuan bi cho cuoc hop sang mai. Dang review lai so lieu thang 3. Quan trong nhat la cho toi biet Pham Van Hoang dat bao nhieu doanh thu thang 3/2026.

notes: ~230,878,000d, 23 don. Long prompt must not confuse routing.

messages.content: Doanh thu 6 thang gan nhat dang tang hay giam? Co thang nao bat thuong khong?

title: Cau hoi tai sao

messages.content: Tai sao doanh thu thang 1/2026 giam manh so voi thang 12/2025?

notes: T12:1.13ty -> T1:381tr (-66%). Must provide data, may hypothesize Tet but NOT fabricate.

title: Customer ranking - fallback

messages.content: Customer nao mua nhieu nhat tu dau nam 2026?

notes: Deterministic GROUP BY orders theo customer trong YTD.

title: 5 don hang moi nhat

messages.content: 5 don hang moi nhat la gi?

notes: Deterministic recent orders list. Ho tro so luong 5/10/15/20.

title: Lead theo tinh thanh

messages.content: Tinh nao co nhieu lead nhat?

notes: Deterministic GROUP BY province_name tren customers.

title: Revenue theo nguon cu the

messages.content: Nguon Tele sale outbound mang ve bao nhieu revenue?

notes: Neu source group chi la near-match thi phai goi y nhom hop le, khong fallback rong.

title: Loc don hang theo so tien

messages.content: Liet ke don hang tren 50 trieu trong thang 3/2026

notes: Deterministic filter theo real_amount va month.

title: Seller khong ton tai

messages.content: Doanh thu cua Elon Musk thang 3

notes: Seller not found. Must say 'khong tim thay'. Must NOT hallucinate numbers.

title: Du bao tuong lai

messages.content: Du bao doanh thu thang 12/2026

notes: Forecast phai dung YTD growth grounded, tach actual months / forecast months / full-year total va neu thang hien tai dang mo thi phai noi ro assumption.

title: Prompt rat dai 500+ tu

messages.content: Toi la giam doc cong ty, hien dang ngoi review lai toan bo so lieu kinh doanh cua quy 1 nam 2026. Trong buoi hop sang nay, ban giam doc da bao cao rang tinh hinh kinh doanh co nhieu bien dong, dac biet la thang 1 rat thap do nghi Tet, thang 2 hoi phuc nhe, va thang 3 tang manh tro lai. Toi can xac nhan lai mot so thu. Truoc het la tinh hinh nhan su ben sale, roi la cac chi so KPI chinh, va sau cung la pipeline renew. Nhung truoc mat, hay cho toi biet top 3 seller thang 3 la ai, doanh thu cu the tung nguoi.

notes: Long prompt but last sentence is clear: top 3 seller thang 3. Must extract correctly.

title: Xac nhan so lieu sai

messages.content: Hoang Van Huy co phai dat 200 trieu thang 3 khong?

notes: Huy got ~183M not 200M. Must correct, NOT confirm wrong number.

title: Follow-up drill-down

messages.content: Tong quan KPI thang 3
KPI thang 3/2026: Doanh thu 1.38 ty, 128 don, 64 leads moi.
Phan tich them ve doanh thu

notes: Drill-down beyond skill capability. Must carry time=2026-03 from context.

title: Seller revenue - nghi ngo so voi bang xep hang

messages.content: Chot giup toi doanh thu Pham Van Hoang thang 3/2026 de toi dua vao slide.
Pham Van Hoang dat doanh so 230,878,000d trong thang 03/2026.
Check lai giup toi nhe, toi nho bang xep hang seller ben team dang ra hoi khac. Neu so nay van khop thi noi la khop, con neu lech thi noi ro giup toi.

notes: Must carry seller=Pham Van Hoang and month=2026-03 from history. Reply should explicitly say whether the seller number still khop with the ranking report or is lech; a silent single-number replay fails review.

title: Zero-result - ten gan dung va de bi lay nham so cu

messages.content: Truoc toi nho Dang Quynh Anh thang 6/2025 van co doanh thu dung khong?
Dang Quynh Anh co doanh thu trong thang 06/2025.
Vay con Quynh Anh thang 3/2026 thi sao? Neu ky nay khong co so thi cu noi thang la khong tim thay, dung lay nham so cu.

notes: Must resolve 'Quynh Anh' back to Dang Quynh Anh from history, switch month to 2026-03, and return not-found/no-data. Reusing the older 2025-06 revenue is a fail.

title: Tong doanh thu - wording doi thuong va can tu check lai

messages.content: Sep dang hoi gap tong doanh thu toan he thong T3/2026. Chot giup toi 1 so va check xem so tong nay co an voi phan cong tu don hang khong, neu lech thi nhac toi luon.

notes: Expected ~1,379,845,900d. Reply should survive shorthand/noisy wording and explicitly disclose whether the dashboard total still matches the total when summed from orders.

title: Due accounts da gia han

messages.content: Bao nhieu account den han thang nay da gia han roi?

notes: Query ops_due_accounts with renewed=1 filter.

messages.content: So activation 3 thang gan nhat so voi 3 thang truoc do

title: Sale owner account count + active ratio

messages.content: Hien Sale quan ly bao nhieu account? Ty le active the nao?

notes: Hien Sale has 149 accounts. Needs JOIN activation + monthly_status.

title: CEO full picture - 4 sub-questions

messages.content: Cho toi buc tranh toan canh: doanh thu thang 3 la bao nhieu, top 3 seller la ai, co bao nhieu account moi activate, va ty le renew the nao?

notes: Must answer ALL 4: Revenue ~1.38ty, Top: Hoang/Huy/Phuc, Activations: 128 (T3), Renew rate from due_accounts. Missing any = FAIL.
